business.address: Unit 14/16 Salpietro Street, Bibra Lake WA 6163

hero.sub: Custom steel, stainless and aluminium fabrication for mining, industrial, commercial and marine clients. Workshop-built in Bibra Lake, installed right across WA.

intro.heading: A Perth fabrication shop that builds it right the first time.
intro.body: Offer Fabrications delivers high-quality custom steel, aluminium and stainless-steel solutions for commercial, industrial and trade clients. We work directly with you — from a sketch on the back of a docket to full engineered drawings — no middleman, no outsourcing.

capabilities.heading: Fabrication capabilities
capabilities.sub: From a one-off custom part to a full production run — designed, cut, welded and finished in-house.

items.title: Custom Steel Fabrication
items.body: Mild and structural steel cut, formed and welded to spec — frames, brackets, bins, platforms and bespoke one-offs.

items.title: Stainless Steel
items.body: Food, marine and architectural-grade stainless — benches, cabinets, filleting stations and corrosion-resistant builds.

items.title: Aluminium Fabrication
items.body: Lightweight, corrosion-proof aluminium work — boat components, frames, panels and marine fit-outs.

items.title: Enclosures & Switchboards
items.body: Ventilated equipment cabinets, switchboard enclosures and weatherproof housings for industrial and mine-site gear.

items.title: Bins, Racks & Handling
items.body: Tipping bins, forklift bins, equipment racks and materials-handling gear built tough for the yard and the site.

items.title: Balustrades & Gates
items.body: Balustrading systems, handrails, emergency gates and access solutions for commercial and residential sites.

items.title: Marine & Boat Components
items.body: Custom boat fittings, brackets and alloy components fabricated for the harsh WA marine environment.

items.title: MIG & TIG Welding
items.body: Clean, strong welds across steel, stainless and aluminium — production runs or precision repairs.

items.title: On-Site Repairs & Install
items.body: Mobile fabrication, breakdown repairs and installation — we bring the workshop to your site across WA.

feature1.heading: Steel, stainless and aluminium — all handled in-house.
feature1.body: No outsourcing, no runaround. We take the job from design through to a finished, ready-to-install build under one roof — so quality stays consistent and timelines stay tight.

points.rest: Custom single builds or repeat batch runs, same quality every time.
Fabricated in Bibra Lake, installed or repaired across WA — including mine sites.
Talk straight to the people actually building your job.

work.heading: Recent work
work.sub: Real fabrication from the Bibra Lake workshop and out on site — no stock photos, just the gear we build.

projects.heading: Our fabrication ends up where it matters.
projects.sub: Work fabricated in our Bibra Lake shop has gone on to serve some of Western Australia's biggest resource and industrial operations.
projects.note: Fabrication supplied for projects and contractors working on these sites.

feature2.body: We don't stop at the roller door. From tipping bins for the yard to valve enclosures bolted down on a live gas site, we deliver, install and repair right across Western Australia — including remote mine sites.

steps.title: Enquire
steps.body: Send through your idea, drawing or photo. We'll talk materials and what's possible.

steps.title: Design & Quote
steps.body: We scope the job, recommend the right build and give you a clear, fixed quote.

steps.title: Fabricate
steps.body: Cut, formed, welded and finished in our Bibra Lake workshop to spec.

steps.title: Deliver & Install
steps.body: Pick-up, delivery or full on-site installation anywhere across WA.

contact.heading: Start your build
contact.sub: Tell us what you need fabricated. Send a sketch, drawing or photo and we'll come back with a quote — usually within a day or two.

ctaBanner.heading: Got a job that needs building properly?

footer.blurb: Custom steel, stainless and aluminium fabrication. Workshop-built in Bibra Lake, installed across Western Australia.
